name: CPUUtilization
definition: Host CPU usage for the cache node. Use for all engines, and especially for Memcached or smaller Redis-family nodes. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric missing, wrong namespace, or the selected engine surface is not present in Tsuga
cardinality_footguns: Prefer engine, cluster, or node grouping; do not assume client-level fields exist

name: FreeableMemory
definition: Reclaimable host memory and a leading headroom signal before cache instability. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric missing, wrong namespace, or unsupported surface in Tsuga
cardinality_footguns: Node grouping is safe; avoid grouping by any raw client identity

name: NetworkBytesIn
definition: Host-level inbound network bytes, useful when demand shape changes before cache-efficiency metrics move. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric missing, wrong namespace, or unsupported surface in Tsuga
cardinality_footguns: Use node or cluster grouping only

name: NetworkBytesOut
definition: Host-level outbound network bytes, useful for egress-heavy cache patterns and replica or client fan-out. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric missing, wrong namespace, or unsupported surface in Tsuga
cardinality_footguns: Use node or cluster grouping only

name: EngineCPUUtilization
definition: CPU usage of the Valkey or Redis OSS engine thread and the most precise Redis-family saturation signal on larger nodes. [Inferred from Std]
cardinality_footguns: Do not compare blindly across engines; this is Redis-family only

name: CacheHitRate
definition: Cache efficiency ratio for Valkey or Redis OSS. Lower values often indicate evictions, expirations, or missing keys. [Inferred from Std]
cardinality_footguns: Use cluster or shard grouping; avoid over-grouping by node when the question is cache value

name: CacheHits
definition: Successful read-only key lookups in the main dictionary. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: No Redis-family traffic, wrong namespace, or no Redis-family telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Useful as numerator in hit-ratio and cache-value formulas

name: CacheMisses
definition: Unsuccessful read-only key lookups in the main dictionary. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: No Redis-family traffic, wrong namespace, or no Redis-family telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Misses are high-signal when shown as a ratio or paired with backend pressure

name: BytesUsedForCache_Redis
definition: Total bytes allocated by Valkey or Redis OSS for dataset, buffers, and other cache purposes. [Inferred from Std]
cardinality_footguns: Tier splits are useful when data tiering is enabled

name: DatabaseMemoryUsagePercentage
definition: Percent of memory used by the Redis-family cluster. [Inferred from Std]
cardinality_footguns: Do not confuse with total capacity percentage on data-tiered clusters

name: DatabaseCapacityUsagePercentage
definition: Percent of total Redis-family data capacity in use, including SSD on tiered clusters. [Inferred from Std]
cardinality_footguns: Most useful where data tiering exists; otherwise can overlap with memory-usage percentage

name: Evictions_Redis
definition: Number of keys evicted because the Redis-family cache hit maxmemory. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: No evictions, wrong namespace, or no Redis-family telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Show as rate or grouped hotspot chart; do not average away

name: CurrConnections_Redis
definition: Number of client connections excluding replica connections for Valkey or Redis OSS. [Inferred from Std]
cardinality_footguns: Some monitoring connections are expected; interpret trends, not absolute purity

name: SuccessfulReadRequestLatency
definition: Latency of successful read requests in Redis-family caches. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric missing, wrong namespace, or no Redis-family telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Prefer percentiles if supported live; do not combine reads and writes into one chart

name: SuccessfulWriteRequestLatency
definition: Latency of successful write requests in Redis-family caches. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric missing, wrong namespace, or no Redis-family telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Prefer percentiles if supported live; keep separate from read latency

name: ReplicationLag
definition: Replica lag behind the primary node. Replica-only metric and key failover-readiness signal. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: No replicas, wrong namespace, or no Redis-family telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Replica-only metric; absence is ambiguous until topology is confirmed

name: TrafficManagementActive
definition: Boolean signal that ElastiCache is actively managing traffic because the node cannot process all incoming work safely. [Inferred from Std]
cardinality_footguns: Keep as boolean/state visual; do not normalize as a rate

name: ErrorCount
definition: Total number of failed Redis-family commands during the period. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: No command failures, wrong namespace, or no Redis-family telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Pair with latency or traffic-management state to avoid overreacting to tiny counts

name: AuthenticationFailures
definition: Failed AUTH attempts for Valkey or Redis OSS and a strong security signal. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: No auth failures, wrong namespace, or no Redis-family telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Likely low-volume but high-value; avoid noisy groupings

name: CurrConnections_Memcached
definition: Current Memcached connections, including expected ElastiCache and internal connections. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Interpret trend rather than assuming all connections are client traffic

name: GetHits
definition: Memcached get requests where the key was found. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Best used in a hit-rate formula with GetMisses

name: GetMisses
definition: Memcached get requests where the key was not found. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Best used in a hit-rate formula with GetHits

name: Evictions_Memcached
definition: Non-expired Memcached items evicted to make space for new writes. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Do not average away; evictions are a direct memory-fit symptom

name: NewConnections
definition: New Memcached connections received during the period. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: No Memcached traffic, wrong namespace, or no Memcached telemetry present
cardinality_footguns: Good denominator for connection churn or instability analysis

name: BytesReadIntoMemcached
definition: Bytes read from the network by the Memcached cache node. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Node or cluster grouping only

name: BytesWrittenOutFromMemcached
definition: Bytes written to the network by the Memcached cache node. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Node or cluster grouping only

name: UnusedMemory
definition: Memcached memory not used by data, but not necessarily available for more data because overhead still consumes memory. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Do not interpret as true allocatable free space

name: CurrItems
definition: Current number of Memcached items stored in cache. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Use cluster or node grouping only

name: ElastiCacheProcessingUnits
definition: Serverless compute-consumption metric tracking ECPU usage driven by CPU time and data transferred. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Most useful per serverless cache or engine; avoid mixing with node-based capacity charts

name: BytesUsedForCache_Serverless
definition: Serverless data-storage metric and main proxy for stored-data growth. [Inferred from Std]
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: May overlap in name with Redis-family metric; Stage 3 should keep it gated unless live serverless telemetry appears

name: SaveInProgress
definition: Binary metric showing a background save is currently running on Redis-family nodes. [Inferred from Std]
cardinality_footguns: Use as an annotation-like operational clue, not as a throughput KPI

name: CPUCreditBalance
definition: Remaining CPU credits on burstable ElastiCache nodes and a key signal for T-class headroom collapse.
absence_means: Node is not burstable or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Useful only on burstable node families; do not generalize across all clusters

name: CPUCreditUsage
definition: CPU credits consumed by burstable ElastiCache nodes, which rise when sustained CPU demand exceeds the baseline allowance.
absence_means: Node is not burstable or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Useful only on burstable node families; treat as a rate, not a level

name: ActiveDefragHits
definition: Active defragmentation reallocations on Redis-family nodes and a signal that the engine is reclaiming fragmented memory.
absence_means: Feature disabled, unsupported engine version, or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with memory fragmentation; raw totals alone are not a problem statement

name: DatabaseMemoryUsageCountedForEvictPercentage
definition: Percent of Redis-family memory counted toward eviction and therefore closer to practical maxmemory pressure than broad memory usage alone.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: Best interpreted with memory usage and evictions, not by itself

name: MemoryFragmentationRatio
definition: Redis-family allocator fragmentation ratio showing how much extra memory overhead exists beyond the active dataset.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog for this environment
cardinality_footguns: High values need memory context; fragmentation alone does not prove user-visible impact

name: MasterLinkHealthStatus
definition: Replica link health status for Redis-family topology and a direct indicator of whether a follower is cleanly connected to its primary.
absence_means: No replicas, unsupported topology, or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Replica-only metric; absence is ambiguous without topology context

name: ReplicationBytes
definition: Bytes replicated from Redis-family primaries to replicas and a direct measure of replication write volume.
absence_means: No replicas, unsupported topology, or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Best read with replication lag so throughput is not mistaken for distress

name: NetworkBandwidthInAllowanceExceeded
definition: Events where inbound network bandwidth allowance is exceeded on an ElastiCache node, indicating host-network saturation on ingress.
absence_means: No allowance breaches or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Use with host and traffic context; sparse counters should not dominate the overview alone

name: NetworkBandwidthOutAllowanceExceeded
definition: Events where outbound network bandwidth allowance is exceeded on an ElastiCache node, indicating host-network saturation on egress.
absence_means: No allowance breaches or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Use with host and traffic context; sparse counters should not dominate the overview alone

name: NetworkConntrackAllowanceExceeded
definition: Events where an ElastiCache node exceeds connection-tracking allowance, indicating too much concurrent connection state for the host network budget.
absence_means: No conntrack breaches or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Pair with connection counts; this is a saturation symptom rather than normal traffic accounting

name: NetworkPacketsPerSecondAllowanceExceeded
definition: Events where an ElastiCache node exceeds packet-rate allowance, indicating packet-heavy traffic is outgrowing host network capacity.
absence_means: No packet-rate breaches or metric not present in the live Tsuga catalog
cardinality_footguns: Most useful when packet counts or connection churn indicate many small requests
